data.title: Shiba Inu Price Eyes $0.0002 As Burn Rate Targets 1 Trillion SHIB Daily
data.description:

data.title: Coinbase’s $2.9B Deribit Buy Unleashes 24/7 U.S.-Regulated BTC & ETH Futures
data.description:
Coinbase has launched 24/7 CFTC-regulated Bitcoin and Ethereum futures via Coinbase Derivatives LLC, the first such offering in the US. Cleared by Nodal Clear and backed by Virtu, ABN AMRO and Wedbush, the move follows its $2. 9bn Deribit purchase and precedes planned perpetual contracts. The post Coinbase’s $2
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-deribit-24-7-futures-launch/

data.title: Gemini Bags Malta MiFID License, Eyes EU-Wide Crypto Perps Rollout
data.description:
Gemini has obtained a MiFID II license from Malta’s regulator, giving it EU-wide access to offer perpetual futures and other crypto derivatives. The exchange has also said it has been pursuing a MiCA license to widen services while competitors Coinbase and Kraken expand through major acquisitions.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/gemini-bags-malta-mifid-license-eyes-eu-wide-crypto-perps-rollout/

data.description:

data.description:

data.title: Doodles NFT token stalls after airdrop
data.description:
The newly launched DOOD token from Ethereum-based NFT project Doodles has seen a steep drop in market capitalization following its May 9 airdrop on the Solana network. According to data from DEX Screener, DOOD’s market cap fell from over $100 million shortly after launch to around $60 million at the time of writing. Overall, the much-anticipated airdrop was “[d]efinitely underwhelming,” a crypto commentator said in a May 9 X post.  DOOD token performance on May 9
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/doodles-nft-token-stalls-after-airdrop?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Solana price gained 500% the last time this SOL metric turned bullish
data.description:
Key Takeaways:Solana's 15% surge and potential close above the 50-week EMA signal strong bullish momentum, which previously led to a 515% rally in 2024. The $120 million in liquidity bridged to Solana reflects growing network confidence. Solana (SOL) price gained 18% this week, signaling rising bullish momentum. The altcoin is approaching a pivotal point, with a potential close above the 50-week exponential moving average (EMA), a level that has historically catalyzed significant rallies
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/solana-price-gained-500-the-last-time-this-sol-metric-turned-bullish?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Taiwanese Lawmaker Warns Reserves at Risk – Should Taiwan Hold Bitcoin Now?
data.description:
Taiwanese Lawmaker Ko Ju-Chun has urged the government at the National Finance Conference on May 9 to add Bitcoin to national reserves, suggesting a 5% allocation as a hedge against currency volatility and potential conflict, while Taiwan’s FSC advances draft rules for virtual asset oversight.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/taiwanese-lawmaker-urges-government-to-add-bitcoin-to-national-reserves/

data.title: NFT-Ecosystem Token Built on Solana (SOL) Falters After Gaining Surprise Support From Binance Futures
data.description:
A non-fungible token (NFT) marketplace built over the smart contract platform Solana (SOL) is seeing red after abruptly gaining support from the world’s largest crypto exchange by volume.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/09/nft-ecosystem-token-built-on-solana-sol-falters-after-gaining-surprise-support-from-binance-futures/
